# Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the `copilot-instructions.md` file in `.github` is created.
- [x] Clarify project requirements: React project requested.
- [x] Scaffold the project: React + Vite files created in `.`.
- [x] Customize the project: minimal starter UI and styles added.
- [x] Install required extensions: none required by setup info.
- [ ] Compile the project: `dist/` not detected yet; run `npm.cmd run build` once to finalize.
- [ ] Create and run task: optional; can be added on request.
- [x] Launch the project: confirmed running at `localhost:5173`.
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete: `README.md` present and updated.

## Notes

- This workspace uses a Vite React starter structure.
- In this PowerShell profile, use `npm.cmd`/`npx.cmd` to avoid execution policy blocks on `npm.ps1`.
